L1.area: Image mode conversion and color space transformation processing

L2.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability exists where attacker-controlled parameters passed to an image conversion function can overflow a fixed-size stack buffer through unbounded string formatting operations, potentially allowing arbitrary code execution.

L3.area: Image mode conversion and color space transformation processing
L3.description: A buffer overflow vulnerability exists where attacker-controlled parameters passed to an image conversion function can overflow a fixed-size stack buffer through unbounded string formatting operations, potentially allowing arbitrary code execution.

ground_truth.reason: Unbounded sprintf calls with attacker-controlled mode string parameters can overflow a fixed-size static buffer in the image conversion error path, potentially allowing arbitrary code execution.
